creator: bugs-freebsd-org916@ketas.si.pri.ee
text:
right

are you saying there is such option there already or it would be needed to be added, just as a boot flag? i think i didn't see any of such thing there right now

when i hacked it, noone really suggested it. in fact noone cared either

but yes, if you tell that there is no such feature yet and it should be boot flag. then maybe yes. this is better place

now comes the hard part, understanding how to implement and then documenting it. choosing flag letter is also hard

unsure why boot flags didn't come up here, i knew it all before. maybe it was just easier to put that if into kernel. it works, but hard to type in and remember

tho, there are other hidden parameters somewhere there. iirc the tunable that stopped my 4 core h3 board running time randomly from all cores also was only found in src and commit logs. tho, it was current. one of reasons i'm with fbsd for 22 years is proper code and doc qc. i want this to stay
